ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose how paths are wrapped when copied to clipboard (useful for paths with spaces)
ast.target: 选择将路径复制到剪贴板时的包裹方式（对含空格的路径很有用）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Control which path formats appear in the context menu
ast.target: 控制在上下文菜单中显示哪些路径格式

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Display absolute path copy options in menus (Desktop only). Absolute paths will use the path wrapping setting above.
ast.target: 在菜单中显示复制绝对路径选项（仅限桌面端）。绝对路径将使用上方的路径包裹设置。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Display the file:// URL copy option in menus (Desktop only)
ast.target: 在菜单中显示复制 file:// URL 的选项（仅限桌面端）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Display the Obsidian URL copy option in menus
ast.target: 在菜单中显示复制 Obsidian URL 的选项

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Display the markdown link copy option in menus
ast.target: 在菜单中显示复制 Markdown 链接的选项

ast.name: text
ast.target: 路径格式示例：

ast.name: text
ast.target: • 文件 URL：file:///C:/Users/name/vault/folder/file.md（Windows）或 file:///home/user/vault/folder/file.md（Linux/Mac）

ast.name: text
ast.target: • Obsidian URL：obsidian://open?vault=MyVault&file=folder/file

ast.name: text
ast.target: • Markdown 链接：[[filename]]（wiki 风格）或 [filename.md](./path/filename.md)（标准）
